title: Baby Bath Toys, Wind Up Magnetic Fishing Games Toy with Fishing Net Floating Pool Bathtub Toys, Montessori Toys for Toddlers, Boys, Girls, 1 2 3 4 5 Years Old, 4 Pcs (Style C)
features: Magnetic Fishing Game Bath Toy: It is an ideal bath toy to accompany your baby in the bath. The bath toy set contains 1 magnetic fishing rod, 4 clockwork swimming float toys, and 1 fishing net. With a fishing rod and the magnets within each bath toy, your baby may easily catch these fish and crabs. You may also use a fishing net to catch them and use them several times to keep your baby from crying and to make bath time enjoyable

Easy and Safe Play: It is made with high-quality plastic that is safe, long-lasting and harmless. The rounded edges and smooth surface are intended to cause the least amount of harm to the infant. A simple twist of the mainspring below will cause little fish and crabs to swim and splash water, without the need for batteries

Entertainment and Educational Bath Toy: It can be used as a wind-up bath toy by itself in the bathtub, and it can also introduce your infant to the joys of fishing. Children's capacity to recognise colours is enhanced by bright hues. Babies can improve their motor skills, hand-eye coordination, and dexterity with swimming bath toys. As your infant bathes and plays, various animals can help them distinguish animals and practice their memory

Parent-Child Interactive Toys: They are an ideal way to divert the baby's attention and are a good helper for mothers because the baby won't cry as much after the bath. In the tub, your baby will have a lot of joy watching little fish and crabs swim and splash. With the aid of baby bath toys, Mom may bathe her infant. In addition to being small enough for a newborn to grasp, the mother can assist the child in twisting fishing and bath toys

Ideal Gift: These bath toys are appropriate for infants aged 0–6 years. They make the ideal present for children's birthday celebrations, Christmas, and other occasions. It is ideal for young children and newborns. It is suitable for use in swimming pools, bathtubs, etc. Allow your infant to enjoy themselves in the water
description: Product Description Multiple fun bath toy set to make your baby love bathing! The video showcases the product in use. The video guides you through product setup. The video compares multiple products. The video shows the product being unpacked. Video Player is loading. Whether as a bath toy to accompany your child in the bath, or as a recreational fishing toy on the ground, our fishing game bathing set is ideal. Each clockwork bath toy has a strong magnetic force that allows your baby to easily attach these bath toys with a fishing rod. Babies are prone to crying in the bath, wind up bathing toys can easily distract the baby's attention, and the little fish and crabs swimming in the water will surprise the baby! (no battery needed, just twist the mainspring) Play in bathtub Suitable for bathtub, swimming pools, etc. Let the baby have fun in the water, no longer afraid of water. Play in swimming pool When your baby is playing in the pool, you can also take our bath toys to make your baby more happy when playing in the water. Play on ground Not just a bath toy, but also a fishing toy. Improve baby's hands-on ability and hand-eye coordination. Cute wind up bath toys Four cute little animal clockwork toys. Crabs and fish of different colors, the more clockwork is twisted, the longer the small animals swim! Baby can easily turn the joystick to quickly catch small fish. Bathtub toy has a leak hole, which can ensure the good swimming of the toy The clockwork toy has a strong magnetic force, which is convenient for the baby to fish easily Bath toys that need no batteries, just wind up and are safe for babies to use
